sections.paragraph:
ἔξοχος, ον (s. prec. entry; Hom. et al. in poetry; in prose in Cornutus 16 p. 20, 21, Plut., Lucian, Herodian and other late wr., incl. Vett. Val. 16, 1) prominent (SibOr 5, 284) μάρτυς a prominent confessor to the death = distinguished martyr MPol 19:1. Superl. (Ps.-Lucian, Asin. 2; OGI 640, 16; POxy 1469, 1) τὸ ἐξοχώτατον the most preëminent thing 1 Cl 33:4.—M-M.

prec. prec. = preceding

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Cornutus Cornutus , I a.d.—List 5

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Lucian Lucian , II a.d.—List 5

Herodian Herodian = Herodianus Historicus, III a.d.—List 5

  1. wr. = writers, writings

incl. incl. = including

SibOr SibOr = Oracula Sibyllina, II–III a.d.—List 5

MPol MPol = Martyrdom of Polycarp; after II a.d.—List 1

Ps.-Lucian Ps.-Lucian , after II a.d.—List 5

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 354
